title: cyclobalanopsis longinux var. kanehirae
intro: Cyclobalanopsis longinux var. kanehirae, also known as Kanehirae oak or Japanese evergreen oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family Fagaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine in East Asia, particularly in China and Japan, to treat a variety of ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis longinux var. kanehirae include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
